interface.longDescription:
Get food delivery to your doorstep from thousands of amazing local and national restaurants. Find the meal you crave and easily order food from restaurants.

• Satisfy your unique cravings e.g. “Show me the highest rated burgers that can be delivered in under 30 mins”
• Search by restaurant name, cuisine, dish, meal or craving e.g. “I want something spicy”
• Browse restaurants and dishes that are deliverable to your location
• Jump directly into the Uber Eats app or website to complete your order

Currently available in the US.
defaultPrompt: What healthy lunch options can I get delivered
